name: silence_trimmer
description: Trim leading and trailing silence from audio. Configurable threshold and padding.
long_description: VoiceStudio reference plugin for trimming silence. Removes silence from the start and end of audio based on an amplitude threshold. Useful for cleaning up recordings.
author: VoiceStudio

threshold_db.description: Amplitude threshold in dB below which is considered silence

padding_ms.description: Padding in ms to keep at trim boundaries
